title: Banana pancakes – 2 ingredients
excerpt: Herman Lensing and I are currently working on our stage production "VOORSKOOT en lipstiek." Marion Holm is directing. Since we cook in our production, we naturally chat about food. Marion told us about the recipe. I made 2 versions. You can …
html:
Herman Lensing and I are currently working on our stage production “VOORSKOOT en lipstiek.” Marion Holm is directing. Since we cook in our production, we naturally chat about food. Marion told us about the recipe. I made 2 versions. You can dress it up with whatever you like. If you haven't booked for the production yet, do it now! Opening at the Woordfees on 12 and 13 March in Stellenbosch!

 

INGREDIENTS:

  • 1 banana
  • 2 eggs

NOW:

  1. whisk or blend everything together
  2. fry in shallow oil
  3. drain on kitchen paper

2nd VERSION – INGREDIENTS:

  • 2 bananas
  • 2 eggs
  • 125ml flour
  • 5ml baking powder
  • pinch of salt

NOW:

  1. whisk or blend everything together
  2. fry in shallow oil
  3. drain on kitchen paper

You can serve it with cinnamon sugar, syrup, honey, yoghurt or cream. It's a quick breakfast or a bite for the hunger that's nagging at you. The first version is wonderful for someone who is gluten intolerant. My husband tasted both and said he prefers the first version! For me they were a bit flat and I enjoyed the 2nd, puffier pancakes more. Decide for yourself.
